title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Geothermal startup Fervo Energy to raise up to $1.3B in IPO
summary: Enhanced geothermal startup Fervo Energy’s IPO could value the company at up to $6.5 billion.

title: World Liberty sues Justin Sun for defamation in WLFI dispute
summary: World Liberty Financial claimed Sun engaged in defamatory tactics and prohibited token transfers, including shorting the WLFI token and conducting straw sales on behalf of others.

title: Someone Built an Open-Source 'Theoretical Mythos' to Reverse-Engineer Anthropic's Most Dangerous AI
summary: OpenMythos is a from-scratch attempt to reconstruct the architecture behind Claude Mythos, the cyber-capable model Anthropic refuses to release. It's speculation in code form.

title: DTCC eyes October tokenized securities launch with 50 DeFi and TradFi giants
summary: With $114 trillion in custodied liquid assets, Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation looks to position tokenization as the future of existing financial system.

title: OpenAI’s cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO
summary: AI chip maker Cerebras is heading for a blockbuster IPO that could value it at $26.6 billion or more. Its relationship with OpenAI is deep and rich.

title: DeepClaude Lets You Run Claude Code With DeepSeek's Brain for 17x Cheaper
summary: A new open-source script swaps Claude Code's expensive Anthropic backend for DeepSeek V4 Pro, OpenRouter, or Fireworks AI—keeping the agent loop, slashing the bill.

title: Tether Gold tops $3.3B as demand for bullion-backed tokens rises
summary: Tether’s XAUt tops $3.3 billion as gold reserves reach 154 tons, with demand rising amid geopolitical tensions and shifting expectations for Federal Reserve policy.

title: Western Union Launches USDPT Stablecoin on Solana via Anchorage Digital
summary: Remittance giant Western Union’s USDPT token will power cross-border payments and a consumer spending product launching in 40+ countries.

title: Elon Musk’s only AI expert witness at the OpenAI trial fears an AGI arms race
summary: Stuart Russell is a long-time AI researcher who thinks governments need to restrain frontier labs.

title: Elon Musk sent ominous texts to Greg Brockman, Sam Altman after asking for a settlement, OpenAI claims
summary: Musk texted OpenAI's president and co-founder saying that he and CEO Sam Altman "will be the most hated men in America" if OpenAI doesn't settle the suit.

title: Anthropic and OpenAI are both launching joint ventures for enterprise AI services
summary: Both Anthropic and OpenAI have partnered with asset managers to more aggressively market their enterprise AI products.

title: DTCC Reveals Launch Plans for Tokenization Service With Wall Street Giants Onboard
summary: DTCC, the infrastructure giant managing $114 trillion in securities, will begin tokenizing Russell 1000 stocks and Treasuries.
